objective: Acquire first 20 net-new buyers for demand-validated services with CAC payback of 3 months or less.

experiments.target_audience: High-intent operators searching for revenue attribution and AI workflow ROI fixes.
experiments.kill_rule: Pause when CTR < 2% after 1,000 impressions or CPL > $250 for 7 days.
experiments.scale_rule: Increase weekly budget by 20% when CPL <= $120 and close rate >= 20%.
experiments.notes: Primary CTA maps to Revenue Signal Audit ($500) and escalates qualified buyers to sprint offers.

experiments.target_audience: COO, Ops, and RevOps leaders in 5-200 employee companies.
experiments.kill_rule: Pause sequence when reply rate < 1.5% after 1,000 sends.
experiments.scale_rule: Expand list volume 25% weekly when reply rate >= 5% and demo rate >= 0.5%.
experiments.notes: Outbound sequence focuses on 30-day implementation sprint for teams with active but underperforming growth channels.

experiments.target_audience: Agencies and consultants serving operations-heavy SMB clients.
experiments.kill_rule: Pause partner lane after 45 days with zero referred demos.
experiments.scale_rule: Add one new partner each week once two consecutive weeks hit >= 3 referred demos.
experiments.notes: Partner lane anchors on agentic ops hardening for compliance-sensitive and reliability-sensitive client accounts.
